overall.description: First-person exploration through a neon-lit underground market in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks past a large bronze fighting statue, various food stalls with glowing holographic signs, and through a gritty industrial corridor toward a bright exit. The environment features dense cyberpunk aesthetics with scattered NPCs and holographic billboards.

events.description: camera circles around the bronze statue to view it from different angles

agents.ego_description: circling around the large bronze statue, observing the monument and surrounding market stalls

notable_agents.action: standing near the statue base looking up at the monument

entered.detail: large bronze monument of dynamic fighting figures in combat poses on a concrete pedestal
massive holographic billboard displaying NEW JOBS GET AN UPGRADE in bright yellow text
cluster of glowing neon signs and holographic advertisements for market stalls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a large bronze fighting statue in a semi-covered plaza. The camera circles the monument, revealing intricate details of the dynamic combat poses. Neon signs and holographic billboards glow in the background, while a sparse crowd of NPCs moves through the area. The environment features industrial concrete architecture with scattered debris on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor alley with counter seating

events.description: moving from the open statue plaza into a narrow alley of food vendors
shifting from cool blue neon to warmer orange and red lighting of food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alley lined with food vendors, passing seated customers at counters

notable_agents.action: sitting at a counter eating food from the stall

entered.detail: food vendor with red neon signage labeled SHU and illuminated menu displays
tall vertical vending machine with blue lighting and FRIED BATTER text
blue glowing pyramid-shaped neon sign hanging above the alley

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow food vendor alley with warmer neon lighting. The camera moves past the SHU food stall and a fried batter vending machine on the left, while customers sit at counters on the right. A blue neon pyramid sign hangs overhead, and steam rises from cooking equipment. The space feels enclosed with industrial metal and concrete surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market plaza with overhead billboard

events.description: exiting the narrow food alley into a wider open plaza area
approaching the large overhead NEW JOBS billboard visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, navigating between scattered pedestrians and market stalls

notable_agents.action: walking across the plaza path in front of the camera

entered.detail: mobile food cart with bright orange neon tubing and glowing display case
overhead concrete and metal canopy structure with hanging cables and lights
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wider market plaza with mixed lighting conditions. The massive NEW JOBS billboard dominates the far view, while a bright orange neon food cart sits to the right. Concrete support pillars and overhead walkways frame the space. The crowd density increases with pedestrians walking in scattered patterns across the concrete ground littered with debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall with prominent open signage

events.description: approaching the food stall with large green OPEN neon sign
turning left around the food stall to continue through the market

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling a food stall, observing the vendor and seated customers

notable_agents.action: vendor working behind the food stall counter preparing orders

entered.detail: food vendor with large green OPEN neon sign and illuminated menu boards above counter
tall illuminated vertical menu showing food items and prices in red and white
plastic chairs and tables arranged in front of the stall for customers

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a food stall marked by a prominent green OPEN neon sign. The vendor works behind the counter while customers occupy plastic chairs outside. A tall vertical menu display glows to the right. The scene transitions as the camera turns left, revealing a darker corridor entrance ahead and moving away from the open plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit corridor with graffiti leading to exit

events.description: entering the darker corridor with NO REGRETS graffiti on the wall
approaching the bright exit light at the end of the dark corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a gritty corridor toward a bright exit, passing vending machines and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: leaning against the wall near the blue vending machines

entered.detail: large spray-painted text NO REGRETS on concrete wall above the corridor archway
pair of glowing blue and red vending machines against the right wall
metal security gate leading to a brightly lit exterior area with intense white light

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a darker industrial corridor marked by the iconic NO REGRETS graffiti. The lighting shifts to low fluorescent tubes as the camera passes blue glowing vending machines. The corridor leads toward a bright exit gateway, with the intense white light creating a stark contrast to the dark surroundings. An NPC leans against the wall, and trash piles are visible near the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit underground market that transitions from a wide public plaza into a claustrophobic industrial corridor. It begins by circling a large bronze fighting statue amidst industrial concrete and glowing holographic billboards before narrowing into a food vendor alley filled with rising steam and warm neon signs. The scene then expands into a wider market plaza dominated by a massive NEW JOBS billboard and orange food carts, where the camera weaves through a denser crowd of pedestrians. As the camera passes a green OPEN sign and a glowing vertical menu, it turns away from the open plaza and enters a darker, gritty corridor marked by NO REGRETS graffiti. The movement finally concludes as the lighting shifts to dim fluorescent tubes and blue vending machines, leading toward a stark, bright white exit gateway.
